title: SpaceX gears up for Starship Flight 13
description:
SpaceX plans to conduct its next Starship launch as soon as July 16 to test fixes to issues from the previous flight and deploy functioning Starlink satellites.

title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
description: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

title: OpenAI’s Head of Safety Is Leaving the Company
description: Johannes Heidecke’s departure comes as OpenAI tries to further integrate its research and safety teams.

title: FCC approves first Reflect Orbital satellite
description:
The Federal Communications Commission has given its approval for a satellite that will test the ability to reflect sunlight into nighttime regions, a project sharply criticized by astronomers and environmentalists.

description: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.
